title: Understanding Subtraction Concepts

sentences.text: Look at these colorful objects we have on the screen.
What happens when we take some away from this group?
Let’s count these objects together before taking some away.
Now, I will take away two objects. How many do we have left?
Here are two groups of objects. Let’s compare their amounts.
Can you find the difference in the number of objects between these groups?
Today we learned about taking away objects and comparing groups.
Great job exploring subtraction with these fun objects!

teacherNotes: Encourage students to engage actively with the objects on screen while learning subtraction.
